search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com as requested. Prioritized concrete guide pages over the home page. No result marked public claims ready.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Main hero hub with character list, equipment section, and faction filters. Good lead for hero discovery and roster cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster, factions, and gear references.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research hub with category tabs and level cost tables. Useful for identifying research names and badge cost structure.
results.primary_user_job: Check research categories and per-level badge costs.

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Entry guide that includes early hero guidance and basic progression tips. Best as supporting context, not mechanic proof.
results.primary_user_job: Understand early-game hero usage and starter progression.

search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost

search_records.search_notes: Search returned no indexed results on the allowed domain within the query scope and freshness window. No discovery leads found.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages were found for the allowed domain using the provided query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Used the approved domain only. Results favor concrete system pages and one event page directly linking research and hero progression. No public-claim readiness marked.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event page with a research-focused cycle called Age of Science, plus hero upgrade and reward details.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks tied to research and hero upgrades
claims_to_verify: Event cycle includes research speed-up tasks
Hero upgrade tasks are part of the same event rotation
Reward tiers and ranking payouts are listed

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core building page for technology research and unlocks; useful for mechanics cross-checking.
results.primary_user_job: Verify how research is unlocked and performed

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Main hero overview page covering hero classes, power factors, and progression concepts.
results.primary_user_job: Cross-check hero categories and power growth systems
claims_to_verify: Hero power factors include level, stars, skills, equipment, and tech
Heroes are core commanders for offense and defense

search_records.search_notes: Search on the approved domain returned no indexed results for the exact query. No discovery leads found from packsify.com within the allowed source scope.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages were found on www.packsify.com for the provided query.

search_records.search_notes: Search limited to mmediamreza.com. Returned a mix of Last Z-specific guides and one alliance page. Chose concrete guide/reference pages over generic pages and excluded the alliance page from results due to lower guide relevance.

results.title: Military Center Guide: Maximize Unit Cap & Base Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide for the Military Center building; covers unit cap, base power, unlock level, and refugee assignment.
results.primary_user_job: Compare Military Center value and upgrade impact.
claims_to_verify: Officer refugee can boost the building.

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Level-by-level rider camp upgrade guide with training cap, speed, and power data.
results.primary_user_job: Check rider camp upgrade costs and stat gains.
claims_to_verify: Rider Camp has a level table.
Upgrades change cap, speed, and power.

results.title: How to create farm accoun (Farm Account Guide) - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Alt-account setup guide focused on farming resources for a main account, including season restriction notes.
results.primary_user_job: Learn how to set up a resource farm alt.
claims_to_verify: Farm accounts are used to transfer resources to a main account.
Creation may be limited after Season 1 on a server.
